home.intro_p: An intimate retreat in the heart of the city, where modern comfort meets the warmth of home.

appartamento.title: A space tailored for you
appartamento.p1: Located in <1>Via del Lazzaretto 15</1>, just 20 meters from the Gewiss Stadium and the Lazzaretto event area, our apartment boasts an unparalleled location in Bergamo.
appartamento.p2: Città Alta, the modern city center, and the new Chorus Life hub are all within comfortable walking distance. You'll also be just a few hundred meters from the city's most charming historic districts: Borgo Santa Caterina, Borgo Pignolo, and Borgo Palazzo.

servizi.title: Our Services
servizi.wifi_desc: High-performance connection for your moments of relaxation or productivity.
servizi.aria_desc: The ideal climate, adjustable to your liking at any time.
servizi.cucina_desc: Everything you need to prepare your favorite meals independently.
servizi.posizione_desc: A few steps from the beating heart and the wonders of Bergamo.

galleria.title: The Property

posizione.title: Where we are
posizione.desc: Find us in the heart of Bergamo, just steps away from the Lazzaretto and the Gewiss Stadium. A perfect location to explore the city.

instructions.title: Apartment Access
instructions.subtitle: Lazzaretto City Walk
instructions.s1_p1: Go to <0>Via del Lazzaretto 15, Bergamo</0> <1>(open in maps)</1> and stand in front of the pedestrian gate.
instructions.s1_p2: By accessing the link you received after confirming your online check-in, you will find two buttons: <1>PORTA PALAZZO</1> (Building Door) and <1>PORTA APPARTAMENTO</1> (Apartment Door).
instructions.s1_p3: Press the <1>PORTA PALAZZO</1> button, and after a few moments both the pedestrian gate and the building staircase door will open.
instructions.s2_p1: Once inside the building stairs, go up to the <1>second floor</1>. When you reach the floor, head to the door exactly in front of you. You will easily recognize it because it's the only one equipped with a numeric keypad on the knob below the handle.
instructions.s2_subtitle: You can unlock the door knob in two ways:
instructions.s2_meth1_p: Use the <1>PORTA APPARTAMENTO</1> button found in the same link used for the building entrance.
instructions.s2_meth2_p: Open the same link to view your access code.
instructions.s2_meth2_note: 👉 We advise you to write it down to avoid problems if your phone runs out of battery during your stay, or in case a temporary malfunction makes the virtual buttons go offline. In this case, to unlock the knob, press any key to activate the keypad, enter the code, and press the padlock key.
instructions.s2_final: Once the knob is unlocked in either of the two ways indicated, <1>rotate it to open the door</1>.
instructions.s3_in_p: To lock the door from the inside, simply rotate the silver knob located below the handle.
instructions.s3_out_p: To lock the door from the outside, you must <1>first unlock the knob</1> using one of the methods described for opening it, and then rotate it to lock the door. If the knob is not unlocked first, it will spin freely and the door will not lock.
instructions.s4_keys_intro: Once you enter the apartment, on the cabinet to your right you will find a small basket containing an <1>emergency key</1>. This key opens both the pedestrian gate and the building staircase door.
instructions.s4_keys_warning: 👉 Please carry it with you at all times during your stay, to guarantee access if your phone runs out of battery, or in case a temporary malfunction makes the virtual buttons go offline.
instructions.s4_keys_checkout: Upon check-out, put it back in the same basket, and remember to lock the apartment door when leaving.
instructions.s4_list_title: On the same cabinet you will find:
instructions.s4_list2: the hosts' contact info, available in case of need
instructions.s5_p_title: Inside the apartment you will find:
instructions.s5_list1: kitchenette, fully equipped for cooking and dining
instructions.s5_list2: washing machine located in the hallway cabinet between the living room and bathroom
instructions.s5_list3: bathroom with complementary toiletries and clean towels
instructions.s5_list4: an extra blanket for the night, located inside the gray wardrobe
instructions.s6_temp_p: The thermostat is already set to a comfortable temperature. If necessary, you can adjust it using the up and down arrows. You can find the AC remote control on the nightstand next to the bed.
instructions.s6_blinds_p: If you wish to darken the ceiling skylights, you can use the extendable rod located behind the fire extinguisher at the entrance.
instructions.s6_elec_p: In the event of a power outage: check the electrical panel located inside the apartment, right behind the door. If all the switches are already up, go to floor -1 in the stairwell and reactivate the meter switch shown in the photograph.
instructions.footer_p: For any needs, do not hesitate to contact us. We will be happy to assist you.
